description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Send SMS/MMS using Textellent API

from.description: The sender phone number in E.164 format

to.description: The recipient phone number in E.164 format

mediaFileIds.description: Array of media file IDs to attach

mediaFileURLs.description: Array of media file URLs to attach

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.
